name: Chocolate Raspberry Cream Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, blend all ingredients for crepes until smooth.
2. Heat a 6-inch non-stick skillet pan over medium-high heat and coat with vegetable spray.
3. Pour 2-3 tablespoons of batter into the pan, swirling to form a crepe. Cook 1 minute on each side or until golden. Repeat with remaining batter. Crepes can be stacked and frozen well. Makes 14 crepes.
4. To prepare the white chocolate sauce: Gently melt the chocolate over low heat, stirring at intervals. Set aside.
5. In a small saucepan, place cream and bring to boil. Add corn syrup, stirring until blended. Gradually add the cream mixture to the melted chocolate, stirring until smooth. Stir in the liqueur and vanilla extract. Keep warm.
6. Yield: 1 cup.
7. To prepare the raspberry cream: Whip the cream, raspberry liqueur, and sugar until soft peaks form. Fold in about a quarter of the raspberries.
8. To serve: Spoon some chocolate sauce over the center of each dessert plate. Spoon a generous 2 tablespoons of raspberry cream down the center of each crepe. Fold the sides over and place seam side down on the chocolate sauce. Sprinkle with raspberries and garnish with mint. Serve immediately.
